SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedById], [t].[DeletedAt], [t].[DeletedById], [t].[ImageUrl], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[ModifiedById], [t].[Name], [t].[Price], [t].[ShopId], [t].[Stock], [t].[UpdatedAt], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1], [c].[Id], [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedById], [p0].[DeletedAt], [p0].[DeletedById], [p0].[ImageUrl], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ModifiedById], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[DeletedAt], [c].[DeletedById], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Color], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[DeletedById], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ShopId], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id] AS [Id0], [s0].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [p].[ShopId] = [s].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [Sellers] AS [s0] ON [s].[SellerId] = [s0].[Id]
    WHERE [s0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedById], [t].[DeletedAt], [t].[DeletedById], [t].[ImageUrl], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[ModifiedById], [t].[Name], [t].[Price], [t].[ShopId], [t].[Stock], [t].[UpdatedAt], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1], [c].[Id], [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedById], [p0].[DeletedAt], [p0].[DeletedById], [p0].[ImageUrl], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ModifiedById], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[DeletedAt], [c].[DeletedById], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Color], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[DeletedById], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ShopId], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id] AS [Id0], [s0].[Id] AS [Id1]

WHERE [s].[Name] = N'Book Store'

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Color], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[DeletedById], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ShopId], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id] AS [Id0], [s0].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [p].[ShopId] = [s].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [Sellers] AS [s0] ON [s].[SellerId] = [s0].[Id]
    WHERE [s0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1], [c].[Id]

    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [p].[ShopId] = [s].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [Sellers] AS [s0] ON [s].[SellerId] = [s0].[Id]
    WHERE [s0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1], [c].[Id]

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM [Products] AS [p]
INNER JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [p].[ShopId] = [s].[Id]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedById], [t].[DeletedAt], [t].[DeletedById], [t].[ImageUrl], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[ModifiedById], [t].[Name], [t].[Price], [t].[ShopId], [t].[Stock], [t].[UpdatedAt], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1], [c].[Id], [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAt], [p0].[CreatedById], [p0].[DeletedAt], [p0].[DeletedById], [p0].[ImageUrl], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[ModifiedById], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[UpdatedAt], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[DeletedAt], [c].[DeletedById], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Color], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[DeletedById], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ShopId], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt], [s].[Id] AS [Id0], [s0].[Id] AS [Id1]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [p].[ShopId] = [s].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [Sellers] AS [s0] ON [s].[SellerId] = [s0].[Id]
    WHERE [s0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Id], [t].[Id0], [t].[Id1], [c].[Id]

FROM [Products] AS [p]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedById], [t].[DeletedAt], [t].[DeletedById], [t].[ImageUrl], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[ModifiedById], [t].[Name], [t].[Price], [t].[ShopId], [t].[Stock], [t].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[DeletedAt], [c].[DeletedById], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Color], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[DeletedById], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ShopId], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN [Shops] AS [s] ON [p].[ShopId] = [s].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[Stock] > 0 AND [s].[Status] = 1
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY

2025-04-11 22:48:29.714 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (5ms) [Parameters=[@__p_0='0', @__p_1='9'], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[Color], [t].[CreatedAt], [t].[CreatedById], [t].[DeletedAt], [t].[DeletedById], [t].[ImageUrl], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[ModifiedById], [t].[Name], [t].[Price], [t].[ShopId], [t].[Stock], [t].[UpdatedAt], [c].[Id], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedById], [c].[DeletedAt], [c].[DeletedById], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[ModifiedById], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt]
FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[Color], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedById], [p].[DeletedAt], [p].[DeletedById], [p].[ImageUrl], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[ModifiedById], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[ShopId], [p].[Stock], [p].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY (SELECT 1)
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
